description: List contents of one or more directories. Each directory returns a formatted listing with name, type (dir/file), size, and modification time. When recursive is true, lists all files recursively using relative paths from the root directory. Example: {"_": ["/home/user/project/src"], "recursive": true}
name: list_directory

recursive.description: If true, recursively list all files and subdirectories. When false (default), only lists one level.
